data.name: Hentai World Market
data.detailed_description:
Do you have the attention and determination needed to conquer this challenge? The objective may seem simple—locate and pair up matching images—but don’t be deceived. As you move forward, you’ll discover that success requires keen observation, solid focus, and real persistence.

Although the game has a calm and laid-back vibe, it continuously stimulates your mind. It’s easy to understand and start playing, yet surprisingly addictive—once you begin, you’ll feel motivated to continue and show that you can overcome every level.

Features:

Timeless arcade-inspired matching mechanics

Soothing background music for a relaxing experience

Full-screen mode unlocked after completion

data.short_description: This calm yet addictive matching game challenges your focus and persistence. Pair identical images to progress, but success demands sharp observation, strong concentration, and determination to conquer every level.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
